title: nellica mendoncae
side_effects: Nellica mendoncae can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing dizziness, nausea, and stomach discomfort due to its high concentration of alkaloids. Prolonged use of the plant without proper supervision can lead to allergic reactions, skin irritation, and respiratory issues. In extreme cases, improper use of Nellica mendoncae can also cause vomiting, diarrhea, and even liver damage. Additionally, people with pre-existing medical conditions may experience severe complications when using the plant without a qualified healthcare professional's guidance.
